title: Oil surpasses $90 due to escalating tension in the Middle East
summary: Iranian attacks on oil tankers and the Houthi threat to block the Red Sea send crude oil soaring and fuel uncertainty in the markets.

title: Wall Street opens higher supported by the recovery of semiconductors and the earnings season
summary: The main US indices rise in a session with optimism for tech stocks and hopes for peace in the Middle East.

title: Semiconductor stocks rebound led by AMD, Micron, and Nvidia thanks to AI demand
summary: The chip sector recovers on the stock market after recent falls driven by prospects for artificial intelligence and memory manufacturing.

title: Andy Burnham becomes British prime minister with a program of major reforms
summary: The Labour leader promises the biggest change in four decades, including a permanent ban on new oil licenses in the North Sea.

title: Bitcoin recovers to $63,800 amid mixed signals in the crypto market
summary: Bitcoin ETFs return to positive flow as cryptocurrencies digest the geopolitical focus on Iran and the evolution of artificial intelligence.

title: Alibaba launches a new artificial intelligence model that is only surpassed by Anthropic
summary: The Chinese giant presents its most advanced AI system and claims its capabilities are only behind the US leader.

title: European Union imposes a fine of 550 million euros on Alibaba for counterfeit products
summary: The sanction from Brussels on AliExpress amounts to 100 billion yen and seeks to stop the sale of illegal goods on the platform.

title: Morgan Stanley capitalizes on the artificial intelligence boom with million-dollar debt deals
summary: The investment bank benefits from the AI fever by structuring financing for fast-growing technology companies.

title: Euribor rises and mortgage signing in Spain breaks its two-year bullish streak
summary: The mortgage indicator starts the week on the rise while the housing market moderates after almost two years of increases.
